nasb.text: Do not stand at the fork of the road To cut down their fugitives; And do not imprison their survivors In the day of their distress.

esv.text: Do not stand at the crossroads to cut off his fugitives; do not hand over his survivors in the day of distress.

cnv.text: 你不該站在岔路口， 剪除他們中間逃脫的人； 他們遭難的日子， 你不該把他們生還的人交出來。

ccb.text: 你不该站在路口截杀那些逃亡者； 他们遭难的日子， 你不该把幸存者交给仇敌。
